Whip the rest in line |

---
| | Hi Peter,

Liz Cheney. Adam Kinzinger. Lisa Murkowski. Mitt Romney. These RINOs are giving hope to other RINOs- that's why we must replace them! [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9a8756fa70&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- not playing footsie with it.

_The Democrat-only Jan. 6 "Commission" is a partisan exercise to witch-hunt Trump supporters, whitewash Dems from any blame, and protect Nancy Pelosi in particular from consequences of her own decision to refuse additional security support._

Any Republican that supports this sham is a traitor, and we must remove them from office.

Perhaps you heard that Nancy Pelosi refused to seat Jim Jordan and Jim Banks on her little Commission. _Too vocal about the Speaker's own role apparently._

In response, Kevin McCarthy pulled ALL Republicans from the sham Commission- the right thing to do.

Pelosi just cued up her Quisling Republicans to come to her aid!

**Liz Cheney:**

_Republican Rep. Liz Cheney of Wyoming, who previously voted in favor of President Trump’s impeachment, announced her support of Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi’s rejection of ranking Republicans from her January 6 commission.

Cheney’s support comes just months after she criticized the speaker, saying Pelosi has “no business determining which Republicans sit on committees,” adding that such a move “sets a dangerous precedent for this institution.”_

**Adam Kinzinger of Illinois:**

_Republican U.S. Rep. Adam Kinzinger, an ardent foe of former President Donald Trump and his GOP allies in Congress, was being considered by Democratic House Speaker Nancy Pelosi as a late addition to a select committee examining the Jan. 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, the panel’s chair said Thursday.

Cheney and Kinzinger were the only two House Republicans to support the Pelosi panel after Senate Republicans rejected a House-passed effort to create a bipartisan independent commission to look into the storming of the Capitol on Jan. 6 and Trump’s role in inspiring the attack._

Former VA. Rep. Denver Riggleman:

_Pelosi suggested Thursday that she would consider appointing more Republicans to the Jan. 6 probe, less than 24 hours after she nixed two vocally pro-Trump GOP lawmakers for the select panel. Her GOP appointee to the investigation, Rep. Liz Cheney (R-Wyo.), separately made clear that she would support two well-known additions to the committee: Kinzinger (R-Ill.), her partner in conservative opposition to Donald Trump, and former Rep. Denver Riggleman (R-Va.), a possible pick as Cheney's outside adviser in the investigation._

RINOs like Mitt Romney also supported Pelosi's sham Commission, going on Democrat platform CNN to do it.

_**We can't let them get away with this. When one RINO sides with Pelosi and gets away with it, it emboldens others. We need to defeat them in 2022, and make examples of them.**_

Will Nancy look into the vicious partisan investigations of Conservatives and Republicans that are taking place by prosecutors all over the Country? name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016693:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016694:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016695:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016696:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58016692:6wU1z9lzN:m:1:3253819041:5CEA21D89A0C17583B32BA9EF0401292:r)**

body:
Ron DeSantis is spreading disinformation far and wide to make you think he's spent his time in office putting Floridians first ... but all the disinformation in the world can't change reality.
|
---

| | Gov. Ron DeSantis is spreading disinformation far and wide to make _you_ , friend, think he's spent his time in office putting Floridians first ... but all the disinformation in the world can't change reality.

So we've gone ahead and corrected some of his statements for you. (**[If you're already fired up to defeat Gov. DeSantis, elect Charlie Crist, and build a Florida for All, you can chip in here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/If9aJhTpMWT9lgh7pTqQew==/fBQyCxAxzPgPLs3Hnel1Rw==?refcode=20210725_f_1_fl&amount=25)**)

Gov. DeSantis claims he:
* "Strengthened election integrity" >> **WHAT THAT REALLY MEANS >> Enacted voter suppression legislation**
* "Signed anti-rioting legislation" >> **Stomped on the rights of peaceful protestors**
* "Protected women's sports" >> **Signed discrimination against trans kids into law**
* "Kept our state open for business" >> **Ignored medical experts and left the tough decisions to protect Floridians ' lives to local leaders**

Gov. Ron DeSantis and his team know full well he can't win on his record, so they're using disinformation and lies to spin his failures in a positive light.

We're here to correct the record: **_Gov. DeSantis has only ever put Gov. DeSantis first._**

By contrast, **_Charlie Crist 's record -- from his time as State Senator, Commissioner of Education, Attorney General, Governor, and Congressman -- is clear: He puts Floridians first._**

_Are you ready to reject the failed DeSantis record?_

_Are you ready to elect a governor who 'll look out for all Floridians?_

_Are you ready to build a Florida for All?_

body:
Peter -- I'm sick and tired of DC Swamp creatures like Nancy
Pelosi and Dr. Fauci never being held accountable.

FAUCI.
Now, I'm introducing my lawsuit to SUE

17.76 NOW

The Democrats led by Nancy Pelosi, AOC and
the Jihad Squad have painted big red bullseyes on the backs of
American Patriots.
Why?
Because we want to Impeach Biden and Fire
Fauci. . .
Because we oppose the Democrat takeover of
our elections. . .
And because we want to END the nationwide
lockdowns and mask mandates.
If you agree, will you please rush an
emergency donation of 17.76 right away to join my lawsuit to
SUE PELOSI?

Just a short time ago, Democrats kicked me
off my committees and even tried to expel me from Congress (three
times)!
And when I refused to wear a mask in the
Halls of Congress, these same Democrats, Nancy Pelosi threatened
me with thousands of dollars in legal fines.
She even sent me a warning letter with a list
of demands!
I refused to cave and that letter went

|

| | Peter, Amy Klobuchar is revamping the Senate Rules Committee into an engine for change. Klobuchar, the Senate Rules Committee chairwoman, flew the committee down to Atlanta for a special field hearing in the epicenter of Republican attacks on voting rights. “This is a concerted effort against our democracy.” Amy Klobuchar Mitch McConnell's shameless GOP has an authoritarian game-plan in place to limit voting access in diverse communities like Atlanta that came out strong for Joe Biden and flipped both of Georgia's Senate seats blue. McConnell knows that Republican candidates perform best when voter turnout is low. He will do whatever he can to stop Klobuchar's Rules Committee in its tracks. But Amy Klobuchar isn't backing down. “The point is we have a bigger jurisdiction, and that's our democracy.” | **[PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33054330/297694702/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210727_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5ZGNkMGI5LWRlZWUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dIKt1Ng0GQ409dDE2D5quoy5FkprMLnuwaegGVL-y5s=)**

When Democrats Turn Out is leading that charge, Peter. The odds are against us, Peter. If we hope to stand a chance against Mitch McConnell's electioneering, then **we need you by our side**.

| | Wow, Derek: We knew Glenn Youngkin would be leaning into his support of Donald Trump. But we didn’t realize it would come complete with a **rambling, incoherent endorsement** from the twice-impeached former president himself!

Peter,
Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Dr. Fauci has been on the front lines, working to keep our country safe and healthy.
But Republican leadership is waging an all-out war on Dr. Fauci. They tried ruthlessly to get him fired while he was fighting to get vaccines for every American. Now they’re peddling conspiracy theories that undermine the hard work of Dr. Fauci. They don’t care about the sacrifices that our healthcare workers and scientists made to bring us through the darkest days of the pandemic.

Friend,
We may live in a red state, but we must remain persistent in our efforts to make progress. The work of Stacey Abrams in Georgia in the 2020 elections proved success is achievable, but it doesn’t happen overnight. It takes hard work, years of commitment, and consistent engagement to provide the kind of tangible change that West Virginians need and deserve. The WVDP is ready to put in the work, but we cannot do it without you. Will you please help us by making a donation today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: No more probes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la]

Dear Friend,

Almost 81,000 -- that’s how many more Pennsylvanians voted for President Joe Biden than Donald Trump last November.

Yet the “Big Lie” persists. The baseless claims that the 2020 election results were a fraud have resulted in audits in battleground states. These probes continue to disrupt our electoral process and perpetuate that actual lie.

Tioga County is one of the three Pennsylvania counties asked to provide access to voting machines for Trump-ally Senator Doug Mastriano’s “forensic investigation." However, three Republican Tioga commissioners are backing the decision of acting Secretary of State Veronica Degraffenreid to not allow third parties access to voting equipment. Since these audits compromise the safety of the equipment, handing it over would cost Tioga taxpayers thousands of dollars in new machines. If Philadelphia participates in this audit, it could cost taxpayers a whopping $40 million.

We do not need any more costly and unnecessary probes. Instead, we need to keep fighting for free and fair elections through voter education, outreach, and organizing.

Our work on the ground is imperative to protecting voters' rights in Pennsylvania. That's why we're asking you to please support the Keystone Progress Education Fund with a donation today.

DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la&amount=15]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072721la]

Thank you,

Keystone Progress Education Fund

name: Nikki Fried
subject: We're not letting Republicans do this again
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

For years, elected Republicans have claimed to be the party of opportunity, economic growth, and free markets.

Here in Florida, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Here’s why.

Just this year, Governor DeSantis raised our taxes by $1 billion. He went to war with the tech and travel industries, both of which employ thousands of Floridians. He even placed new restrictions on how businesses can protect customers and employees from COVID.

Now, he’s standing directly in the way of our economic health. As I wrote last week [https://www.heraldtribune.com/story/opinion/columns/guest/2021/07/24/gov-desantis-anti-science-stance-damaging-florida/8080288002/] , vaccinating more Floridians is the key to our state’s recovery. But instead of putting our economy first, DeSantis has attacked public health experts in order to score political points.

Thanks to his failed leadership, our economic recovery is at risk.

Friends, we’ve suffered under Republican governors like DeSantis for over 20 years. It’s time for something new: a governor who will work every day to build an economy that works for everyone. If you agree, please click here to chip in and support our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom?refcode=opedemail]

This year, we’re not going to let elected Republicans claim that they’re on the side of businesses and working families. They’re standing in the way of our recovery and throwing us in harm's way.

It’s time for something new.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: An update on Trump’s visit to our district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

My team recently reached out to let you know that Donald Trump will be in our district for a fundraiser on August 5th. name: Defeat Maggie Hassan
subject: Maggie Hassan sits on the Homeland Security Committee, but has done nothing about the growing list of problems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
No action on the border crisis, turning away Cuban refugees - what is Maggie Hassan doing in Washington?
Derek,
Migrants continue to stream across the southern border. The Biden administration has _refused to accept Cuban refugees_. Democrats have knack for turning things from bad to worse.
Though the crisis at the southern border is clear for all to see, Democrats would rather waste $2 Billion of taxpayer money than build a border wall that has already been paid for. Border wall materials have been delivered and construction crews are standing by, the only thing standing between us and a secure southern border is the Washington Democrats.
In Cuba, the regime is brutally cracking down on democracy protesters, and locking up people by the thousand. But here in America, the refugees have been turned away.
Maggie Hassan sits on the Homeland Security Committee; it is her JOB to handle crisis situations like these. And yet, while refugees try to escape socialism, and children are abandoned at the border, _Maggie Hassan does nothing_.
There is no excuse for inaction. Democrats must be held accountable for their awful decisions.

[Help us Defeat Maggie Hassan in 2022](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/1/0100017ae7f94104-f60f1128-b626-40bc-85d5-69aa15be2ecb-000000/ZngoDGwTfFD26jDF3HynTb33mn8=228)

clean_body: Americans love 🇺🇸 Patriotism, not 🇨🇳 Socialism | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ This is unbelievable, Peter. The socialist “Squad” is a threat to our American values, and they absolutely need to be stopped. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is fighting to see that the federal government takes over our economy through her radical, socialist “Green New Deal.” Ilhan Omar refuses to apologize for her anti-Semitism. She compared the United States and Israel to terrorists like Hamas and the Taliban! Cori Bush urges the Left to “defund the police” and defends violent protestors like ANTIFA and Black Lives Matter. These far-left extremists have no positive role to play in our Congress, and only a strong America First movement can defeat them. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: Republicans are preparing to launch a national campaign against this frontline Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

**What we know for sure:** national Republicans have their sights set on defeating Frontline Democrat Rep. Jahana Hayes (CT-05) in the midterm elections. They're funneling money into her battleground district as we send this, and they're preparing to back ANY Republican candidate that challenges her.

When Jahana flipped the 5th District in 2018, she became Connecticut's first Black woman elected to Congress. She's no stranger to breaking down barriers and making history. In fact, President Barack Obama nominated her National Teacher of the Year in 2016. The GOP wants to silence Jahana, and news broke this week that a Republican challenger has already lined up a GOP operative as a general campaign consultant.

Team, we can't let Republicans buy this race -- especially because the road to a Republican-controlled House runs straight through Jahana's district. We need your help filling a warchest of resources to prepare for a competitive and expensive midterm election.

**[Karen is rushing emergency support to Jahana to help her square up against any attacks that are coming her way. Will you split a donation between their two campaigns to help Karen and Jahana defend the Democratic House majority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6kfQkkxHU-GPDcejULGSfYbxIypwSthv9T7yMRpZt5s=/W6f2RNJJKCfZFdIvbH36XlZs5JLzHY7_iUPsFQ__Fmo=?gpsid=39_132_19874&refcode=em21_210724_hayes_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_hayes_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Jahana is a leader for the people in Congress. She is working with Karen to forward anti-poverty initiatives, including expanding SNAP benefits, and she's backing Karen's fight for historic policing reform in the House.

From removing barriers for women and children enrolled in WIC to fighting for economic equality, Jahana is putting the American people first every single day. But she'll need grassroots support to go up against Republican attacks, which is why Karen is reaching out to this team.

**[Will you split a donation to Karen and Jahana right now to help defend the House majority? clean_body: Team, What we know for sure: national Republicans have their sights set on defeating Frontline Democrat Rep. Jahana Hayes (CT-05) in the midterm elections. They're funneling money into her battleground district as we send this, and they're preparing to back ANY Republican candidate that challenges her. When Jahana flipped the 5th District in 2018, she became Connecticut's first Black woman elected to Congress. She's no stranger to breaking down barriers and making history. In fact, President Barack Obama nominated her National Teacher of the Year in 2016. The GOP wants to silence Jahana, and news broke this week that a Republican challenger has already lined up a GOP operative as a general campaign consultant. Team, we can't let Republicans buy this race -- especially because the road to a Republican-controlled House runs straight through Jahana's district. We need your help filling a warchest of resources to prepare for a competitive and expensive midterm election. Jahana is a leader for the people in Congress. She is working with Karen to forward anti-poverty initiatives, including expanding SNAP benefits, and she's backing Karen's fight for historic policing reform in the House. subject: You and I must defeat cancel culture
body:
{First Name}, by robbing you of your First Amendment rights, the Left is taking away your voice, your freedom, and your ability to fight back!
---

| Peter,
The Radical Left is using cancel culture to rip our country apart. They know their socialist theories can't win the battle of ideas. That's why they resort to cancel culture and censorship to silence anyone who disagrees with them. Peter, by robbing you of your First Amendment rights, the Left is taking away your voice, your freedom, and your ability to fight back! clean_body: We can’t let them turn a “red” state “blue.” | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, If you’re like us, you’ve probably tuned out the mainstream media and their pro-Democrat stories. Like you, we prefer to get our news directly from Real American Patriots. But if you haven’t been paying attention to the Left’s media megaphones, you might not know that the Democrats are targeting Republican states like North Carolina to expand their majorities in the midterm elections. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | North Carolina delivered in a major way for President Trump in the 2020 Election. We know that was thanks to you, and to thousands of Grassroots Republicans who dug in and did what was necessary to defeat the Left and SAVE AMERICA. Now, the Democrats are back -- and they’re pouring everything they’ve got into winning this key Battleground State. We can’t let them succeed. | Thank you. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, we need more leaders in Washington who truly understand the challenges working families face. Nina Turner is one of those leaders.
#
Peter,
Now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington who truly understand the challenges working families face.
**Nina Turner is one of those leaders — and a week from today, voters in Ohio’s 11th District will decide who they want to fill former Rep. Marcia Fudge’s seat in Congress.**
Early voting is already underway, and Nina has the momentum to win. But recent polling suggests that this race is tightening thanks to special interest groups and dark money super PACs that have made Nina their target. So I have to ask:
[**Can you split a $3 contribution between Nina Turner and our campaign today? Any amount you give will help us get out the vote for Nina in the final days of this important primary election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210727?refcode=em20210727-491&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=491_420207_YaQS4M&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210727?refcode=em20210727-491&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=491_420207_YaQS4M&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)**
Born to a working-class family in Cleveland and the oldest of seven children, Nina knows firsthand what income inequality looks like. She took up her first job at age 14 to help support her parents and keep the family afloat — a reality still shared by too many working families today.
Nina’s relentless commitment to centering working families, communities of color, and immigrants by supporting Medicare for All, College for All, a $15 minimum wage, and the Green New Deal represents the kind of leadership we need in Congress to create the tipping point at which real change becomes possible.
**I’ve seen Nina’s work up close, and that’s why I’m so proud to endorse her.** But if we’re going to add another member to our strong progressive coalition in Congress, we have to outwork the special interests aiming to defeat her.
[**We’re running out of time to make a difference. Split a contribution between Nina Turner and our campaign today to help us get out the vote in the final week of this important primary election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210727?refcode=em20210727-491&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=491_420207_YaQS4M&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)
Thank you in advance for supporting Nina’s campaign. Together, we will grow this movement, and we will win.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210727-491-footer&t=23&refcode2=491_420207_YaQS4M&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=491%2E420207%2EYaQS4M)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Larry Klayman
subject: China Served!
body:
Our lawsuit against the Communist Peoples Republic of China - the soul brother of the Biden-Harris regime -- is moving forward and increasing in complexity by the hour.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Freedom Watch.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA) Our lawsuit against the Communist Peoples Republic of China - the soul brother of the Biden-Harris regime -- is moving forward and increasing in complexity by the hour.

**The Communist Chinese government is blatantly responsible for the manufacture and release of the Coronavirus that has devastated our nation.**

And just like Iran was held accountable for the Lockerbie bombing and was ordered to pay $248 million to survivors of their terrorist attack, Communist China will have to pay trillions - **and that still won 't be enough**.

[**Join our class action lawsuit by donating today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)
Honest Chinese scientists have come forward to blow the whistle on their communist government - otherwise known as "the Butchers of Beijing" \-- and, specifically, to blow the whistle on the Wuhan Institute of Virology - **the creator of the COVID-19**.

While Biden-Harris the leftist media tried like hell to write this off as a conspiracy to protect their communist allies, that cat is out of the bag - **and our lawsuit is MONTHS ahead of their new admissions**.

**But it 's costing my organization, Freedom Watch, a fortune. [Any help you can provide with your generosity will be greatly appreciated.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)**

We were unable to serve the Chinese government directly as they dodged U.S. Federal Courts.

So we empowered the U.S. Department of State to deliver our court documents to demand their response - and as much as they hate it, the Biden-Harris Regime has been forced to obey the U.S. Federal Courts and deliver our lawsuit to the Communist lab in Wuhan Institute of Virology.

BUT, and this is a big but: we can't trust U.S. Courts alone with this massive case.

That's why I've filed lawsuits against China in other nations as well along with submitting and filing a complaint to the International Criminal Court.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)
While I still have faith in our legal system, **I don 't trust the Biden-Harris Regime as they have links that tie them directly to the Wuhan Institute of Virology!**

Stay with me on this, it's important.

That's right, when Biden was VP and Obama was President, they awarded a grant to a group called EcoHealth Alliance, Inc., that is comfortably located in rabid leftist Jerry Nadler's Congressional District in New York.

From 2014 until 2019, Biden and Obama gave $3.7 million to EcoHealth Alliance, for the purpose of "understanding the risk of bat coronavirus emergence."

And what did EcoHealth Alliance do with that grant?
**They wired $799k to the Wuhan Institute of Virology to "conduct high-quality testing; sequencing; and analyses of field samples; maintenance of cold-chains from field to lab; and ensuring quality control of sample storage and testing."**
And in 2016, the Wuhan virus lab also received a chunk of money on the project for "human behavioral surveillance."

That last payment to the Wuhan Institute of Virology occurred on May 31st, 2019 and in January of 2020, the first official case of COVID-19 was reported in the United States.

**This entire case is an intricate spiderweb of money, science, and secrecy that has left 600,000 Americans dead while wrecking our economy.**

**And, to make matters worse my client and virology expert Dr. Judy Mikovits, who worked with Dr. Anthony Fauci at the National Institute of Health, has testified to our citizens grand jury that, along with this grant money, Fauci gave the seeds of Covid-19 to the Wuhan Institute of Virology to do illegal "chain of function" research which was then engineered into a bioweapon by the Communist Chinese. Covid-19 then escaped by design or through negligence, wreaking huge destruction on our lives and the nation!**
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)
**And out of necessity, our class action lawsuit is and will be one of the largest in history.[Help fund it today.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA)**

Our next phase of this lawsuit is to dive deep into all of this data and that will take the time and expense of identifying and hiring brave scientists who are at the top of their game and willing to expose the truth.

That's just the tip of the iceberg for this lawsuit. It won't be easy, it won't be fast, but it's our obligation as Americans to fight for justice.

It's our responsibility to demand justice for the lives that have been lost and the millions of families who have been harmed.

**And it 's our duty to demand the truth from powerful governments and hold them accountable! We just don't get documents, we bring hard-hitting lawsuits on behalf of the American people and the victims of Covid-19, which includes you and your loved ones!**

Let's do this together. [**Invest in our historic lawsuit to obtain justice for America**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80VzcuGMspG6XnhOEllF6A/WdGKTWFzmBvDITZEYv892892kA) and to compensate the victims of the Communist Butchers of Beijing, who not coincidentally lined the pockets of Joe and Hunter Biden with out and out bribes. All of the work we put in to flip those four Senate seats over the past year will be for nothing — **unless grassroots Democrats like you step up and make a difference.**

James is sounding the alarm because Glenn Youngkin is an extreme right-winger with close ties to Donald Trump and four recent polls show a razor-thin race.

clean_body: Democrats in Washington have a spending problem. We must stand up against this excessive tax and spend agenda. Let's bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! | Peter, President Joe Biden's first six months in office have been amazingly bad. Our southern border with Mexico is in chaos. We are seeing the highest levels of illegal immigration in 21 years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 1 million migrants crossing the border this fiscal year. In Afghanistan, where U.S. forces are completing a pullout, the radical Islamic insurgents of the Taliban are on the rise, executing prisoners and threatening to reconquer the entire country. Meanwhile, China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, threatening Taiwan and our allies in the western Pacific. Here at home , bad policies, massive spending, and tax increase proposals are driving up prices and inflation for workers and families, while raising the national debt above $28 trillion. | Peter, I'm sure you'll agree - the Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security, and we MUST reclaim our crucial Republican Senate Majority to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin. That's why I founded the RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project, Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's pivotal 2022 Midterm Elections. We only need to wrest one seat from the Chuck Schumer Democrats to return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate - Peter, since Election Day last November, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help retake the majority. With your help, we will take that support to a whole new level. It was the unprecedented outpouring of support from conservatives like you that made it possible for me to defeat the most expensive challenge in U.S. Senate election history, but Republicans running in key races next year across the nation will need the same kind of extraordinary support to emerge victorious. It helps lay the early foundation for successfully reaching voters with our conservative agenda to win huge victories at the polls. I know we still face a tremendous challenge on Capitol Hill, working to resist the worst excesses of the radical Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda until our opportunity comes to defeat them in 2022. on our RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project. Thanks, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Conservative Senate
subject: Brooks vs. Swamp
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

There's a fight brewing in Alabama, for the soul of
the Republican Party.

President Donald J. Trump, Senate Conservatives
Fund, and grassroots conservatives around the country support
conservative stalwart Mo Brooks to be Alabama's next Senator.

The Republican establishment, including retiring
incumbent Senator Richard Shelby, is backing Shelby's former
staffer to replace him. Corporate elites and special interests
are bankrolling her campaign because they're terrified that a
leader like Mo Brooks might actually fight on the issues that
matter most.

Join President Trump and SCF in supporting Mo
Brook's insurgent Senate campaign today!

Senator Shelby is so desperate that he told a D.C.
magazine that Mo is "irrational."

Why is the establishment so afraid of Mo Brooks?

Because he fights...

✅ To protect children from anti-American Critical
Race Theory.
✅ To secure the integrity of our elections.
✅ To protect girls from having to share bathrooms
with boys.
✅ To secure our border against an invasion of
illegal immigrants.✅ To protect your paycheck from Joe Biden's
runaway inflation.

Establishment Republicans don't want to fight. They
want to get along with the woke, corrupt, socialistic elites
running Washington these days. That's why they are supporting
Shelby's inexperienced, unqualified heir-apparent. They don't
want an election, they want a coronation.

Send a message to the D.C. Swamp today by
contributing to Mo Brooks' campaign!

The Republican Establishment is terrified of the
2022 elections. They are hoping that, with President Trump gone,
they can reclaim control of the Party and the country. The only
way to stop their scheme is to support and elect conservative
candidates across the country.

That's why SCF is so active, so early this election
cycle. We can't wait until next year. Lobbyists and corporations
are pouring money into establishment campaigns RIGHT NOW. They're
trying to scare you, silence you, and intimidate you.

They're against Mo Brooks because they know he will
rock their boat in the Senate. We support him for the same
reason.

Click here to rock the boat in the Senate!

Mo Brooks is the only real conservative in the
Alabama Senate race. He's the only fighter. He's the only one
with the guts to take on the Left and the Establishment. He's the
only one who stood with President Trump when the going got tough.

He's in this race for you. So we need to be in this
race for him!

The Establishment is coming after Mo Brooks.
Conservatives need to show them that America belongs to the
people, not the elites.

Click here to give as generously as you can.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to support conservative fighters like Mo Brooks.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

Corporate elites and special interests are bankrolling her campaign because they're terrified that a leader like Mo Brooks might actually fight on the issues that matter most. Join President Trump and SCF in supporting Mo Brook's insurgent Senate campaign today! Senator Shelby is so desperate that he told a D.C. magazine that Mo is "irrational." Why is the establishment so afraid of Mo Brooks? Because he fights... ✅ To protect children from anti-American Critical Race Theory. ✅ To secure the integrity of our elections. ✅ To protect girls from having to share bathrooms with boys. ✅ To secure our border against an invasion of illegal immigrants.✅ To protect your paycheck from Joe Biden's runaway inflation. Establishment Republicans don't want to fight. They want to get along with the woke, corrupt, socialistic elites running Washington these days. That's why they are supporting Shelby's inexperienced, unqualified heir-apparent. They don't want an election, they want a coronation. Send a message to the D.C. Swamp today by contributing to Mo Brooks' campaign! The Republican Establishment is terrified of the 2022 elections. They are hoping that, with President Trump gone, they can reclaim control of the Party and the country. The only way to stop their scheme is to support and elect conservative candidates across the country. That's why SCF is so active, so early this election cycle. We can't wait until next year. Lobbyists and corporations are pouring money into establishment campaigns RIGHT NOW. They're trying to scare you, silence you, and intimidate you. They're against Mo Brooks because they know he will rock their boat in the Senate. We support him for the same reason. Click here to rock the boat in the Senate! Mo Brooks is the only real conservative in the Alabama Senate race. He's the only fighter. He's the only one with the guts to take on the Left and the Establishment. He's the only one who stood with President Trump when the going got tough. He's in this race for you. So we need to be in this race for him! The Establishment is coming after Mo Brooks. Conservatives need to show them that America belongs to the people, not the elites. Click here to give as generously as you can. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support conservative fighters like Mo Brooks. Sincerely, Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund DONATE Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003 Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Team Salud
subject: Our summer challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GSnVKb_V3n-N3HwGQjGRn_wJ_FIfSO1H_OaY_kL6znM=/PwgMzNaqZYUjoRYA5hPk_JyhTqtmLVLwSibpUqlrHhk=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
In the campaign world, it's no secret that summer is the most challenging season to fundraise in. But if you know us, you know we're always up for a challenge, and, with the House majority on the line, there is no time to fall behind.
To match our July 2020 digital fundraising goal, we need over 200 people to contribute before midnight on July 31. Can you put us over the edge by [**_clicking here to contribute today_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GSnVKb_V3n-N3HwGQjGRn_wJ_FIfSO1H_OaY_kL6znM=/PwgMzNaqZYUjoRYA5hPk_JyhTqtmLVLwSibpUqlrHhk=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)?
Although we like to challenge ourselves by setting these goals, the reality is your donation is essential to helping us run a successful campaign and maintaining the House majority.
We know the Republican leadership will do whatever it takes to stop our progressive agenda and regain control of the House. They've already passed hundreds of new bills in states across the country to restrict voting rights and we know they won't stop shy of gerrymandering to ensure new districts slant Republican.
We must stop their power grab by preparing for a tough race today.
Please take a moment to [**_contribute here_** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/GSnVKb_V3n-N3HwGQjGRn_wJ_FIfSO1H_OaY_kL6znM=/PwgMzNaqZYUjoRYA5hPk_JyhTqtmLVLwSibpUqlrHhk=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)to support our grassroots campaign and provide funding for our voter outreach program.
With the House majority at stake, every district matters, and your contribution will go a long way towards ensuring our campaign is well positioned to keep this seat blue.
Thank you for joining us and for your support.

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Voting rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Ohioans deserve an elections system that is transparent and reliable. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux1qKHOZkm1CNR5587tb51oRJ-plBmpbN4TTytIw28CbMo1aPZGYgTonQs9PNmnFF1on1Cdp9Yzh4TBfnS_Xp15A2Hs9FvQSQC62BBcj4mVWwv78ROWV47XGnUDPsyS6ppIvwK7JXmyDs_9yjEqlajhn7Gj6pgUq0bzyyiPjnV3D6Shyj5ox4zpJmYr-JvVLRzgILj0bF-9a0BWvM78lndwTZ1CV-slYW9yUnpAj4NFeIoQ_xqotnlCbmne-djIOFcavMddjje7KVOrBrB1Fg6lpwKra9ZpAbrsU84eCr6RGfo4-aNqiHgQZiQX08uspiPrhikpXYjn7VdvN6iVm9oaR2hkj43pdGNlp3UBgCS1tx3GMWeP4552elIOLtKf8Wz70pibkCOx78Wu4VQMb7JRTvXRftInARcwa9iO8c9KTP/3dy/lX9vjgijQ5ygUxFjRlX_CA/h0/dt4DNPq1JUWKB08G4q4o0xFAD0IGpdYeFtihMYpcBQ0)

| | Friend,

At a time when voting rights are under attack across the U.S., we must pass bold legislation that protects _every_ American’s right to vote.

We’ve recently witnessed _Arizona_ and _Georgia_ become _ground zero_ for voting restrictions. Both states passed laws making it harder for people of color and older voters to cast their ballots. Without action from Congress, there will be nothing to STOP Republicans from passing similar laws in other states.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Orange County, CA, CRT School Board Meeting Tonight - Watch & Send Email Afterward!
body:
| |
---
**ALERT: MEETING TONIGHT!**

**OC-Board of Education meeting on Tuesday evening, July 27, of this week at 6pmPT/9pmET. **

Patriots in Orange County need your help. See their message below.
|
---
Like many, we are experiencing many frustrations with CRT and Ethnic Studies here as we are working to stop the indoctrination of our vulnerable children by the CCP thru our governmental schools.

Tonight, the Orange County Board of Education is hosting a Critical Race Theory Expert Forum, and we need your help!

[Here is also the link](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjA4LWZlYzFhMTc0NzY3ODQ1NjhiZDIzMzQ5MDgyNjM1MGZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1VRUVLRDg5N3dxbyZtaWQ9NDQxMTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=E6PUgnJdhrnXCkygV-h2cg) for anyone that cannot attend in person.

Then, to all receiving this, after you watch this mtg of experts discussing CRT w/ board members, **please send an email to Mari Barke, the president of our Board of Education re why you are against CRT.** Mari is a courageous Christian lady and has asked me to ask all of you for your help. Her email is [mari@MariBarke.com](mailto:mari@MariBarke.com).

For more details about the meeting, [see this media advisory](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjA4LWZlYzFhMTc0NzY3ODQ1NjhiZDIzMzQ5MDgyNjM1MGZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1VwZGF0ZWRfTUVESUFfQURWSVNPUllfZHJhZnRfV3VfMDcyMS0yLnBkZj9taWQ9NDQxMTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nHE-svKZtVTIFspJ-3Ibzw).

And, if you want to but it's not required, please let me know so I can keep track of how many TPPatriots from outside of Orange County here in SoCal helped us. Email: [anetathinkofallonline@gmail.com](mailto:anetathinkofallonline@gmail.com "anetathinkofallonline@gmail.com").

Aneta ThinkOfAll
|
---

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Support our troops, not partisan hacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I’m sure you’ve seen the news, but our legislature is currently being held up by Democrats who chose to hide in Washington rather than do their job and legislate in Austin.

But just this Saturday, Dallas Democrats had the audacity to solicit “care packages” to help them as they continue to neglect their duties as legislators.

Instead of asking for Dr. Pepper, salsa and hair spray, these Democrats should be asking for flights back to Texas to perform the duties they were elected to perform.

But while these pretenders obstruct democracy here in Texas, there are thousands of men and women across the globe in our armed forces who are truly sacrificing to protect our democracy.

So today, Friend, I’m asking you to help send a care package to a soldier abroad rather than an obstructionist in Washington.

[Follow this link to find instructions on how you can help give one of our soldiers a piece of home today.](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=cab79340123f470c900bf741f95158ba&_e=x-MrXT4guJpPv33xXqZ6QuXmpOrPgkTJaZ9HztRSaKLPedWWnU6p7GDF0RJnlb4GXkY6zTv_kxbS0k_5QKsfSEm36oVvHqbBxcTmgohwC3nqXaM79_gYpYK_CTkRh9Z4wL40PI0f54BISxjNApYgNA-ZrtECklynWOlEOWU7SR2hRzf7t3Bra8hGVeAZewa2QfsjaKGtoGOR8qKaDKWTxe9u9q9po5g35d6crolZtXQgbX-jlqL--g3hKvE33P_McAYvVZs9aaZ1ESGYzvpCXA%3D%3D)

God bless Texas and God bless America.

Sincerely,
Wesley

name: Giffords.org
subject: Have you heard of the National Shooting Sports Foundation?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
There's nothing the NRA won't do to try and stop our gun safety movement.
Despite filing for bankruptcy back in January, they've continued to spend millions of dollars lobbying Congress and pushing their dangerous agenda.
But what you might not know is that there is a new group emerging recently that is filling the NRA’s shoes while they retreat into bankruptcy.
That group is called the NSSF or the National Shooting Sports Foundation. They have been gaining influence lately and are actually outspending the NRA right now. They’ve been running TV spots in Maine and West Virginia to a total of $1 million to try and stop us from confirming David Chipman as the next ATF Director.
In 2010, the NSSF spent just $300,000 on federal lobbying. And in 2020, the amount they spent was nearly $5 million, more than 16 times higher.
So while we may have weakened the NRA, an equally powerful and equally committed group has emerged to take their place and fight our progress on gun safety.
[**That is why we’re reaching out today, friend. Will you chip in $3 to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF and the NRA who want to stop our progress? The work we are doing at Giffords to make our communities safer is too important to be put at risk.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210727-1-15&t=1&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=14&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=16&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=17&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=18&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=19&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**
---
****
Both the NRA and the NSSF will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from making real change.
But we've gone toe-to-toe with groups like this before — the simple fact that the NRA is a shell of what it once was is a huge testament to the strength of our movement.
And we know that if all of us fight back, we will defeat them and end their influence over Washington for good.
Thank you so much for supporting the work we’re doing,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210727-1-15&t=20&refcode2=403_3935704_yPNG_H&akid=403%2E3935704%2EyPNG_H)**

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Concrete points of progress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
In case you haven’t seen them, I wanted to make sure that you had a chance to learn more about my pledges to the residents of Maryland. [https://www.franchot.com/pledges] Over the past year, we’ve gone through an unprecedented public health and economic crisis that has devastated our small businesses and working families. To ensure that our economy can bounce back even stronger than before, we’re going to need bigger ideas and bolder action than Maryland has seen in more than a generation.
https://www.franchot.com/pledges [https://www.franchot.com/pledges]I have a bold vision for the future of our state, and I hope I can count on your support to help make it a reality. I’m going to rebuild the public’s trust in the competence of state government, so that we can deliver the concrete points of progress that will allow every community to achieve the quality of life they deserve. If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to create 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in industries of the future, build a statewide transit system that kickstarts our economic growth, bring 5G connectivity and high-speed broadband to all communities across the state, and so much more.
My platform also includes getting the basics right for our working families -- including filling potholes on state roads, picking up trash, and answering the phones quickly with a friendly operator who’s there to help.
Together, we can deliver our communities the quality of life they deserve, and make sure that no one is left behind as our state recovers from this once-in-a-generation crisis. Click here to learn more about the future that we can build together. [https://www.franchot.com/pledges]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em072721]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: ADD-YOUR-NAME [Left Action]
subject: "Thank you, Capitol Police officers"
body:
Donald Trump and his Republican followers may try to rewrite history, but we saw what these brave officers did, and we won’t forget it. Ever.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [_ADD YOUR NAME: "THANK YOU, CAPITOL POLICE!"_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0a9e125-9c4e-4228-abd7-860c9038a2f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hey -- When the Capitol was attacked by a violent right-wing mob, **[Capitol Police officers showed incredible courage](https://default.salsalabs.org/T557ba4e6-3ad2-47dd-8f86-c8b2180e4003/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** , defending the building and the leaders inside it — in some cases, at the cost of their own lives. Donald Trump and his Republican followers may try to rewrite history, but we saw what these brave officers did, and we won’t forget it. Ever. [**Please join us in thanking the Capitol Police officers.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c36962f-d67f-46d2-909f-278a41402012/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T853447c0-c85d-469e-9715-de8034fc8e13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:

Peter, I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is George Logan, and I am running for Congress.

We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you:

* I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican
* I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College
* I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate
* I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor

As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect **_your_** daily life.

Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - _but that could not be farther from the truth._ **So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican**, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation.

**Peter , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive.** And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you: I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect your daily life. Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - but that could not be farther from the truth. So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation. Peter , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive. And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. | Democrats in Washington D.C. are fighting for a radical agenda - but that is not a place anyone should ever live. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: My friend, Alex Padilla
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a
donation to support Alex Padilla’s campaign. But before I ask, let me
explain why.

As you know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California
— one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and
anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

But what you might not know is that these same Trump devotees also want to
eliminate our Senate majority by defeating my good friend, Alex Padilla.

Now I’ve known Alex for a while. He isn’t one to back away from a
challenge, but he can’t win a race as big and important as this by
himself. It’s going to take a big team.

I told Alex he could count on us to get 1,000 people to chip in today to
help fuel his grassroots campaign so he can be prepared for the negative
ads coming his way. So what do you say?

$3
contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California? We
can’t afford to lose Alex’s progressive voice in the Senate, and a
donation from you today will help ensure he can continue fighting for us.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: A quick rundown of the final days before our July fundraising deadline (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_July Fundraising Deadline_**
**Contribution Goal:** 40,000
**Deadline Day:** July 31st
**Suggested Donation:** $3
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210727-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1029_6688874_TYLAjl&akid=1029%2E6688874%2ETYLAjl)**
Friends —
We have our July fundraising deadline coming up quickly, so here’s a quick rundown of the days ahead:
* Our goal is to get **40,000 contributions** by the deadline to show the strength of this team.
* So we need to keep up the pace, we only have 4 days left to get it done, so we’re coming directly to you and asking for your support.

Our goal is based on the number of people donating — not a dollar amount, because your contribution is more important than the amount you can give.
And usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about hitting our goal. But another Republican just entered the race to run against Mark in 2022, this one backed by a California billionaire — that brings us to FOUR opponents total now.
It’s clear that we are facing a broad and well-funded field of Republican challengers, and the eventual nominee will likely receive significant funding from national groups for the general election next year.
**So you can see how important your support is to holding this seat, which is why today we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210727-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1029_6688874_TYLAjl&akid=1029%2E6688874%2ETYLAjl)

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210727-1-15&t=18&refcode2=1029_6688874_TYLAjl&akid=1029%2E6688874%2ETYLAjl)**

Team Kelly

Gov. DeSantis has made it clear he sees himself as Trump's mini-me, and **Florida has already seen how destructive he can be.** Over the last few years, DeSantis has prioritized personal political gain over the needs of everyday Floridians time and time again -- and we've all paid the price.

From his failure to protect our state from COVID-19 to his divisive attacks against voting rights, educators, and more, DeSantis has shown us **Florida can 't afford another four years with him as governor** \-- and the nation _certainly_ can't afford four years of him as president.

Defeating Gov. DeSantis in Florida would send the message that he's dead on arrival in national politics, so **it 's crucial that we do everything we can to help Charlie defeat him.** And friend, that's why we're coming to you!

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Files Civil Rights Lawsuit for High School Teacher Fired for Facebook Posts Criticizing Chicago Riots, Looting, and Violence in the Aftermath of George Floyd Killing
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Palatine, Illinois tenured high school teacher Jeanne Hedgepeth, who was fired by the suburban-Chicago school district where she had worked for 20 years after posting comments on Facebook criticizing the riots, violence, and shootings in Chicago in the aftermath of the May 25, 2020, killing of George Floyd.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 26, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56272&L=25447&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2l2aWwtcmlnaHRzLWxhd3N1aXQtdGVhY2hlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzI3MTcwMjE3) | **[Judicial Watch Files Civil Rights Lawsuit for High School Teacher Fired for Facebook Posts Criticizing Chicago Riots, Looting, and Violence in the Aftermath of George Floyd Killing](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56272&L=25447&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2l2aWwtcmlnaHRzLWxhd3N1aXQtdGVhY2hlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzI3MTcwMjE3)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Palatine, Illinois tenured high school teacher Jeanne Hedgepeth, who was fired by the suburban-Chicago school district where she had worked for 20 years after posting comments on Facebook criticizing the riots, violence, and shootings in Chicago in the aftermath of the May 25, 2020, killing of George Floyd. name: Sarah for Wisconsin
subject: not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter, this is not the news we were hoping to share with you today.

**National Republicans and Ron Johnson outraised Democrats last quarter, including our campaign.** They know we have a real chance to flip this seat and expand the Senate majority, which is why big donors are flocking to Ron Johnson and trying to blunt our momentum. We need to catch up.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Mainstream media won't tell you what's really happening at the southern border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki for Congress
body:
So I went there myself | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d899960c4ea3/join-us-tomorrow-morning-for-a-major-announcement-5619841?e=c2296cffff)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=83e679f6fd&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Dear Patriot,

The mainstream news media refuses to cover the crisis at our southern border. It’s why I had to go to the border and expose what’s happening.

It has been seven months since President Biden stopped the Trump border wall from being completed - and now illegals are just one Greyhound Bus ticket away from showing up in your town.

**My name is Amanda Makki. I’m an attorney, a conservative news commentator, a legal immigrant, and I am running for Congress in an open seat in Florida’s 13th Congressional District. **

Despite illegal crossings hitting a 21 year high and arrests hitting the 1.1 million mark already in 2021, the Biden Administration refuses to do anything about it.

**I experienced and saw this crisis firsthand when I visited the U.S-Mexico border in Luna County, New Mexico just a few weeks ago. **

I talked with the Sheriff of Luna County, who is a Democrat. He acknowledged that the Biden-Harris Administration is not giving the brave men and women of our United States Border Patrol and local law enforcement the support they need to keep our border secure.

When will President Biden and Vice President Harris acknowledge this crisis and REINSTATE TRUMP’S POLICIES THAT KEPT OUR HOMELAND SAFE?

[Will you stand beside me, with the largest contribution you can afford, be it $25, $50, $100, $250, $1000, or more?](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3266749162&e=c2296cffff)

It is no news to you that the border crisis is THE top issue of the 2022 midterms as it affects everything else.

_Click on the picture below to watch my 2 minute video where I interview with the Sheriff, a Democrat, who discusses the border crisis with me:_
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c64ad55997&e=c2296cffff)
---
| **Donald Trump showed us that America First means protecting our borders and defending our brave Border Patrol agents.** Our borders must be secure, and our communities must be safe. I will work tirelessly until the border crisis is secure and Trump’s conservative border policies are reinstated.

Friend, the only way to get a check and balance on the Biden Administration’s border policy is to elect conservative candidates like me who will support MAGA policies.

[What can you pitch in today to send a conservative fighter to Washington to fight for strong and secure borders and to help flip the House? Donate today!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a3712e004a&e=c2296cffff)

God bless, Amanda
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Amanda Makki for Congress
---

clean_body: We can’t believe what he said: = Quick — one of Tom’s opponents spoke at a rally with Donald Trump in Arizona this weekend. We can’t believe what he said: “You can’t tell me that Trump didn’t win.” He’s supported Trump’s Big Lie about the election, and now he’s campaigning side by side with Trump. Our opponent is embracing ideas that have no basis in fact, and he’s a danger to our democracy. It’s clear that our opponent and Donald Trump are one and the same, and they pose a threat to our democratic ideals. Trump is trying to help candidates who support his Big Lie — candidates like our opponent. It’s more important than ever that we keep this seat blue, and we know this election is going to be close. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = \--Team O'Halleran **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. name: John Fetterman
subject: re: corporate donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I believe that working people — not corporate execs in secret smoke filled rooms — should be calling the shots in our democracy.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210727-2097-header&t=1&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)
This might be a hot take, Peter, but I'm *not* running to represent these guys:
❌ Giant corporations
❌ Special interest lobbyists
❌ Shady corporate PACs
I'm running to represent _you_. Because I believe working people — not corporate execs in secret smoke filled rooms — should be calling the shots in our democracy. Wild stuff, I know...
That's also why I made an important commitment on day one of this race: **To not accept a single cent from corporate PACs.**
People told me I'd never win a race as competitive and expensive as this one without those deep-pocketed corporate donors. But together, we are proving them wrong. One grassroots, small-dollar donation at a time.
But we're relying on _a looooot_ of grassroots contributions to win this race — **and according to my finance team, you haven't donated to our campaign just yet.** [**_Peter, will you do our campaign a big favor today by sending $5 or more our way for the very first time? I'd be so deeply grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24045?refcode=em20210727-2097&t=2&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24045?refcode=em20210727-2097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)**
Here's a stat I'm incredibly proud of, Peter:
**69.86% of our total fundraising over the past quarter came from grassroots contributions of $200 or less.**
That makes our campaign the most-reliant on grassroots donors of *any* candidate in this Pennsylvania Senate race, Democrat or Republican. Boom. 💯
That's an incredible accomplishment. But it also means that grassroots donations — **the vast majority of which come in through emails just like this one** — are truly what powers our campaign. So I gotta ask just once more today:
[**_Could you kick $5 or so our way today to make your first stake in our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign for all of PA's 67 counties? It'll take a whole lot of yinz to build the kind of campaign that can flip this seat blue in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24045?refcode=em20210727-2097&t=22&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)
Thank you for believing in this campaign + for believing in me. When we flip this seat, I'll never forget that it was you who made it happen.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210727-2097-footer&t=23&refcode2=2097_434096_JJnEyt&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2097%2E434096%2EJJnEyt)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
We’d like to explain why we keep reaching out.
#

We know you've been getting a lot of emails from us, and we’d like to explain why we keep reaching out.
1. **This isn't any ordinary race.** Pennsylvania is 2022's most likely to flip Senate seat and a must-win if we hope to hold on to our Democratic Senate majority.
2. **Malcolm isn't an ordinary candidate.** He's a working person who knows what it's like to wait in line at a food bank, suffer the weight of student debt, and work a minimum wage job.
3. **This is an extraordinary moment.** It's time for working people to have a seat at the table, to ensure our government works for us.

But it's going to take all of us coming together to elect Malcolm to be the champion working families need in the U.S. Senate. That's where you come in, friend.
We've got an important end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Saturday, and we need a groundswell of contributions from supporters like you to stay competitive, win the nomination, and flip this seat blue. So we're asking:
