name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Americans are paying MORE to get LESS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Joe Biden and the radical left are leading America down a very dangerous path. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c230%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9jgCUN4BmYdUzc6y1ITNNQ&sysid=1)
🚨 **CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES 🚨** ** ****_With the Democrats in control in Washington, we need strong conservative governors more than ever._**** ** [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4447%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nqn9jitElYpG4RPJieI9OA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4448%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XmpKKqcmK%2bqd6euSAYGbiQ&sysid=1) Friend, Joe Biden and the radical left are leading America down a very dangerous path. Their out-of-control government spending has inflated the cost of essential goods all over the country. Our gas is more expensive. Our food is more expensive. And our wages? Well, those are going DOWN since Biden took office. All of this inflation is the equivalent of a direct tax increase on all Americans, and this surge - at the fastest pace in thirteen years - is evidence that his economic agenda is failing. America's governors cannot afford to embrace these radical policies if we want our states - or our country - to survive. As governor, I will lead our state in the right direction, unleashing bold reforms to make Arkansas one of the best places in our country to start and grow a business, creating thousands of new, high-paying jobs for our people because that's what Americans everywhere deserve. [**SUPPORT SARAH NOW >> **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4449%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jJOJ3ICu8VMbt2eHra6RKQ&sysid=1) Friend, I am truly honored to have the support of great conservatives - both at home and nationwide. But as we move forward in this race, I’m going to need every patriot on board. I would really like you to join us and become an official member of my team today... But first, I want to share a little bit more about who I am and what I believe. As governor, I will defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny, your second amendment right to keep your family safe, and your freedom of speech and religious liberty. **_I will not be intimidated by the serious challenges we face. I will courageously lead._** I will stand with our brave law enforcement officers, promote law and order, and keep our communities safe by eliminating sanctuary cities. I will fight back against the radical, socialist policies that threaten to destroy so many jobs and I will make the government accountable to the people. I want to see Arkansas reward hard work and prosper -- to create a better future. [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR NOW >> **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4440%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TWROyribKdIqa2mV2zGEaA&sysid=1) Thank you for your time, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4441%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FT7cPd42h0gDlwE0BNqsJA&sysid=1) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

Election analysts say that flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of our best chances to expand our Democratic majority. We’re facing an uphill fight -- but at this moment in the race, we have a major advantage as Republicans have their efforts and war chests focused on winning a messy GOP primary. While they’re fighting amongst themselves to see who can be Donald Trump’s biggest lackey, we have an opportunity to build up our resources so that we’re prepared to take on the winner of the GOP primary and keep up the fight to put workers first from now until next November. [**We know that the eventual GOP candidate will receive millions in support from outside groups, so it’s critical for us to use this time to gain as much of a head start as possible -- will you pitch in to my campaign and Seth Moulton's to help us build the grassroots operation we need to organize across the state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33081919/297789953/602283465?refcode=20210727_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzFjMmI3Ni0yM2VmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8_WA6GEUMpxY-zLjWwmkVeA2D_f9lt-A4AHRkMJ5mA=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33081920/297789954/-1665179247?refcode=20210727_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzFjMmI3Ni0yM2VmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8_WA6GEUMpxY-zLjWwmkVeA2D_f9lt-A4AHRkMJ5mA=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
This event will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for Cawthorn in a single day.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33083216/297794376/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkODg1Ny0yNmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h-yoNW7ERxde9v5fMeF-0HPDiy8ZirWTnlCxp8Wh9A=)

| | Peter, we just found out our Republican opponent Madison Cawthorn is hosting a fundraiser with Donald Trump at Trump’s New Jersey golf club this weekend -- **and charging people $50,000 each to attend.** _This event will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for Cawthorn in a single day._ [**That means hitting our July fundraising goal is more critical than ever, and we could really use your help today -- will you chip in $25 to make sure our people-powered movement stays competitive?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33083217/297794384/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210727_FR_EOM1Fundraiser_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkODg1Ny0yNmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h-yoNW7ERxde9v5fMeF-0HPDiy8ZirWTnlCxp8Wh9A=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33083218/297794394/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210727_FR_EOM1Fundraiser_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkODg1Ny0yNmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h-yoNW7ERxde9v5fMeF-0HPDiy8ZirWTnlCxp8Wh9A=)
---
Jasmine and her family will also be hosting a fundraiser at a golf course this weekend -- at a mini-golf course right here in Western North Carolina. The cost of admission? Five bucks. And there will be sno cones.
Cawthorn’s overpriced photo op with Trump is exactly the kind of decadent event that proves he’s out of touch with Western North Carolina. He’d rather spend his time with Republican millionaires in New Jersey than the people in his community.
**Fancy versus fun. A mini-golf course versus Trump’s New Jersey golf club. $50,000 tickets versus $5, a catered affair versus sno cones, a guest list versus all are welcome. A campaign built on love, hope, and empathy versus a campaign built on a Congressman’s lies, conspiracy theories, and questionable campaign spending.**
For us, the choice is clear. And we’re counting on you to join us. A surge of online contributions before this weekend offsets what Cawthorn’s about to raise in New Jersey -- [**if you’re with us, can we count on you to chip in $5, $25 or any amount to hit our end-of-month goal ahead of the weekend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33083219/297794399/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210727_FR_EOM1Fundraiser_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkODg1Ny0yNmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h-yoNW7ERxde9v5fMeF-0HPDiy8ZirWTnlCxp8Wh9A=)

clean_body: This event will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for Cawthorn in a single day. | = | | Peter, we just found out our Republican opponent Madison Cawthorn is hosting a fundraiser with Donald Trump at Trump’s New Jersey golf club this weekend -- and charging people $50,000 each to attend. This event will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for Cawthorn in a single day. = | | | = Jasmine and her family will also be hosting a fundraiser at a golf course this weekend -- at a mini-golf course right here in Western North Carolina. The cost of admission? Five bucks. And there will be sno cones. Cawthorn’s overpriced photo op with Trump is exactly the kind of decadent event that proves he’s out of touch with Western North Carolina. He’d rather spend his time with Republican millionaires in New Jersey than the people in his community. Fancy versus fun. A mini-golf course versus Trump’s New Jersey golf club. $50,000 tickets versus $5, a catered affair versus sno cones, a guest list versus all are welcome. A campaign built on love, hope, and empathy versus a campaign built on a Congressman’s lies, conspiracy theories, and questionable campaign spending. For us, the choice is clear. And we’re counting on you to join us. A surge of online contributions before this weekend offsets what Cawthorn’s about to raise in New Jersey -- = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We know from Cawthorn’s last public campaign finance report that he’s spending his donors’ money on luxury hotels and new clothes. But every small-dollar donation that Jasmine receives goes straight into building the biggest grassroots organizing campaign that NC-11 has ever seen. clean_body: Did you hear that Joe Biden plans to travel to Lehigh Valley tomorrow? This is one of the few times Biden has decided to visit his home state......... Peter, Did you hear that Joe Biden plans to travel to Lehigh Valley tomorrow? This is one of the few times Biden has decided to visit his home state...do you think Biden visiting the area is purely out of good will? It’s NOT. The Far Left always has a hidden agenda and this time it is to try and boost Susan Wild’s reputation by having the president visit where she is running. Biden and the Radical Left have seen the support that I have been gaining and they are terrified. Susan Wild knows that she can’t win the 2022 election without fear or favor, and that’s why she has been pleading and begging Joe Biden to come to Pennsylvania. Susan Wild NEEDS Biden’s help to win the 2022 election and is willing to do whatever it takes to win, no matter how corrupt. Since her Lehigh Valley events were a failure a few weeks ago, now she’s calling Biden to hold similar events, hoping that his title alone will help her to be successful in the race for congress. Stop Susan Wild’s tampered tactics and corrupt actions. Protect Pennsylvania from the Far Left’s tainted agendas. Thank you for your continued support. I won’t stand for what Susan Wild is trying to do, and I know you won’t either. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

body:
PLEASE CONFIRM BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT: Do you APPROVE of Speaker Pelosi's leadership? | | ******We 're counting on YOUR response right away:** | | **PLEASE CONFIRM BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT: ********Do you APPROVE of Speaker Pelosi 's leadership?**

---|---|---

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

UNIQUE ID: #5907903
SUPPORTER STATUS: **[UNCONFIRMED >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

Speaker Pelosi is an INCREDIBLE leader.

She made history as the FIRST female Speaker of the House.

She led the charge to defend our House Majority and pass the American Rescue Plan.

And as you read this, she's fighting to protect our very democracy.

But the GOP has relentlessly ATTACKED Speaker Pelosi -- so we need to make sure our grassroots Democrats are firmly behind her.

That's why we're calling for 25,OOO responses to our survey before midnight.

******[Will you take our one-question survey before midnight and confirm your support for Speaker Pelosi's leadership? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRqEZ~)******
---

Thank you,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Cody Hoskins, Campaign Manager
subject: We have huge news!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Local leaders are throwing their support behind Derek Marshall

Hi Peter,

We have some exciting news!

Local grassroots and Party leaders across California’s 8th District are uniting early behind Derek campaign—a signal that we’re well poised to face off against Trump-Republican Jay Obernolte in the General Election in what will be a marquee match-up as we fight to flip it blue!

**We couldn’t be more thrilled to announce endorsements from:**
* **Pat Harris,** Former U.S. Senate Candidate for California
* **Pablo Ariza,** Executive Board Representative for California's 42nd Assembly District
* **Aziz Akbari,** President of Alameda County Water District
* **Kareema Abdul-Khabi,** Former Victorville City Council Candidate
* **Socorro Cisneros,** Chair of the Tri Community Democratic Club
* **Amy Champ,** Regional Chair for Central Sierra

[**Pat, Pablo, Aziz, Kareema, Socorro, and Amy know, like we do, that Derek has what it takes to win. Will you stand with them by making a contribution to Derek’s grassroots campaign today? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33084543/297798544/474536728?refcode=07-27-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTBhMzAyYy0yYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Vjj8n7QyQnv1rkrVLXE5-bh-_G38P_k3JOlBwsHG0Y=)

See for yourselves what these incredible community leaders have to say about why they’re supporting Derek:

_“I am proud to endorse Derek Marshall because it’s up to us to fight for the change we want to see. It is extremely important that if we’re going to talk about things like campaign finance reform, Medicare for All, and keeping big pharmaceutical companies at bay that we have to be the ones to do it. We have to support people like Derek.” **\- Pat Harris**_
_“I am proud to endorse Derek Marshall for congress. His genuine commitment to our community and mission-driven focus is exactly what we need. I am excited to join him in the fight that will bring a positive, long-lasting impact to our district.”**\- Pablo Ariza**

“Infrastructure doesn’t always seem quite as exciting as some other political issues, but it impacts our daily lives—from the water we drink to the roads we drive on—more than any other category of government. We need a fighter for good infrastructural investment; an elected official who will stand up for our communities’ rights to clean water, as well as the jobs that come along with taking better care of our roads, bridges, and water facilities. We need someone who will do this while keeping in mind the necessity of water protection, particularly for our indigenous communities who have seen their water sources tapped and siphoned away to bigger cities, and I believe that Derek Marshall understands the importance of both conservation and thoughtful infrastructure development.” **\- Aziz Akbari**

“I am supporting Derek Marshall for Congress because he is passionate about fighting for us and he knows how to fight for all of us in the district and win. The High Desert and mountains need a bold vision of change as we grow and for our children's future- Derek is that leader. I wholeheartedly endorse Derek Marshall for our Congressional District 8.” **\- Kareema Abdul-Khabi**

“I am always proud to support candidates whose values and platforms put community first. I am proud to endorse Derek Marshal for Congress in District 8. I am proud of the commitment to our community, he has to represent us in DC.” **\- Socorro Cisneros**

“This isn't just someone who decided it would be fun to run for Congress but he's a person that has lived his life deeply steeped in the concept of community and what it means to come together as a society and work as a whole to make sure that everyone has what they need and that we are working together and reaching across the aisle and really manifesting solid future that everyone can rely on.” **\- Amy Champ**_

Pat, Pablo, Aziz, Abdul, Kareema, Socorro, and Amy are all throwing their support behind Derek’s campaign because they know he has people like you behind his back.

**[So, if you haven’t already, can we count on you to join Team Derek today as well?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33084545/297798546/474536728?refcode=07-27-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTBhMzAyYy0yYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Vjj8n7QyQnv1rkrVLXE5-bh-_G38P_k3JOlBwsHG0Y=)**
In Solidarity,
**Cody Hoskins**
Campaign Manager, Derek Marshall for Congress

clean_body: Local leaders are throwing their support behind Derek Marshall Hi Peter, We have some exciting news! Local grassroots and Party leaders across California’s 8th District are uniting early behind Derek campaign—a signal that we’re well poised to face off against Trump-Republican Jay Obernolte in the General Election in what will be a marquee match-up as we fight to flip it blue! We couldn’t be more thrilled to announce endorsements from: Pat Harris, Former U.S. Senate Candidate for California Pablo Ariza, Executive Board Representative for California's 42nd Assembly District Aziz Akbari, President of Alameda County Water District Kareema Abdul-Khabi, Former Victorville City Council Candidate Socorro Cisneros, Chair of the Tri Community Democratic Club Amy Champ, Regional Chair for Central Sierra = See for yourselves what these incredible community leaders have to say about why they’re supporting Derek: “I am proud to endorse Derek Marshall because it’s up to us to fight for the change we want to see. It is extremely important that if we’re going to talk about things like campaign finance reform, Medicare for All, and keeping big pharmaceutical companies at bay that we have to be the ones to do it. We have to support people like Derek.” \- Pat Harris “I am proud to endorse Derek Marshall for congress. His genuine commitment to our community and mission-driven focus is exactly what we need. I am excited to join him in the fight that will bring a positive, long-lasting impact to our district.”\- Pablo Ariza “Infrastructure doesn’t always seem quite as exciting as some other political issues, but it impacts our daily lives—from the water we drink to the roads we drive on—more than any other category of government. We need a fighter for good infrastructural investment; an elected official who will stand up for our communities’ rights to clean water, as well as the jobs that come along with taking better care of our roads, bridges, and water facilities. We need someone who will do this while keeping in mind the necessity of water protection, particularly for our indigenous communities who have seen their water sources tapped and siphoned away to bigger cities, and I believe that Derek Marshall understands the importance of both conservation and thoughtful infrastructure development.” \- Aziz Akbari “I am supporting Derek Marshall for Congress because he is passionate about fighting for us and he knows how to fight for all of us in the district and win. The High Desert and mountains need a bold vision of change as we grow and for our children's future- Derek is that leader. I wholeheartedly endorse Derek Marshall for our Congressional District 8.” \- Kareema Abdul-Khabi “I am always proud to support candidates whose values and platforms put community first. I am proud to endorse Derek Marshal for Congress in District 8. I am proud of the commitment to our community, he has to represent us in DC.” \- Socorro Cisneros “This isn't just someone who decided it would be fun to run for Congress but he's a person that has lived his life deeply steeped in the concept of community and what it means to come together as a society and work as a whole to make sure that everyone has what they need and that we are working together and reaching across the aisle and really manifesting solid future that everyone can rely on.” \- Amy Champ Pat, Pablo, Aziz, Abdul, Kareema, Socorro, and Amy are all throwing their support behind Derek’s campaign because they know he has people like you behind his back. = In Solidarity, Cody Hoskins Campaign Manager, Derek Marshall for Congress * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: January 6 Investigation (via WDTO)
subject: Atlanta: Klobuchar puts no-show GOP on blast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC

|

| | Peter, Mitch McConnell is not happy that maverick Senate Rules Committee chairwoman Amy Klobuchar put the spotlight on the GOP's voter suppression efforts in Georgia last week. **“This silly stunt is based on the same lie as all the Democrats' phony hysteria from Georgia to Texas to Washington, D.C.” \-- Mitch McConnell** McConnell told every Republican on the Rules Committee to stay home from last week's field hearing in Atlanta. The shameless GOP is convinced that their authoritarian game plan will go off without a hitch. McConnell knows that Republican candidates perform best when voter turnout is low. Left unchecked, the GOP will limit voting access in diverse communities like Atlanta that came out strong for Joe Biden and flipped both of Georgia's Senate seats blue. But Amy Klobuchar has a message for our “friends” on the right: **“If you just stay in Washington and get doused down and gridlocked out by our archaic procedures in the Senate, you lose sight of what you are fighting for.” \-- Amy Klobuchar** | **[PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33084746/297798775/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210727_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjMGEzMDJjLTJhZWYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KMux4hKG96u_Wt-UJrSr9o-J1qQa4CY29bwNqF56aSk=)**

We need to root out authoritarianism from every polling booth, and the only way to do that is to replace racist Republicans with bold progressives.

When Democrats Turn Out is leading that charge, Peter. Our nationwide digital and ground campaign is firing up progressives everywhere to come out in full force this November, launching the blue wave that will strengthen our fragile majorities in the House and Senate. The odds are against us, Peter. If we hope to stand a chance against Mitch McConnell's electioneering, then **we need you by our side**.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I'm not giving up – and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FXLA1DHWAeBaYRhRgZTTtsTnbvG4uBmR&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
First, well over 100 Republicans voted against certifying Joe Biden's democratically won Electoral College votes.
Then, after Donald Trump's Big Lie about the election spurred a violent attack on our nation's Capitol, all but a handful of Republicans voted against forming a bipartisan, 9/11-style commission to investigate the Jan. 6 insurrection.
A congressional investigation into the Jan. 6 attack is finally beginning - but if the Republican leadership had had its way, there would be no investigation at all.
With their words, their votes, and their actions, Republicans in Congress have proven themselves committed not to truth, democracy, or the Constitution, but to Donald Trump - a twice-impeached, historically corrupt former president.
Fortunately, Speaker Pelosi and House Democrats overrode Kevin McCarthy and GOP objections. And despite McCarthy's attempts to stack the deck with obstructionists like Ohio Rep. Jim Jordan - who can claim credit for personally motivating and emboldening those same insurrectionists - House leadership has moved forward with establishing a select committee that will investigate the Capitol attack with seriousness and care for uncovering the facts and the truth.
**But Republicans and the right -wing media are attacking Speaker Pelosi in an attempt to undermine the legitimacy of this investigation. That's why I'm counting on you to stand with Democrats today and speak out clearly for truth, accountability, and justice.**
**[I need 1,000 concerned citizens to take action before 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please: Will you add your name now to show your support for Speaker Pelosi's investigation to find out the truth about Trump's Big Lie and the Jan. 6 insurrection?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0106commission?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1036-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-gop%3Fcode%3Djtk1036-su-nd)**
We cannot allow Republican extremism to hold truth and accountability hostage.
Thank you for speaking out,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1036-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lWpfh1h4OJS%2F0uNY32XqmsTnbvG4uBmR&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Jim Jordan - who can claim credit for personally motivating and emboldening those same insurrectionists - House leadership has moved forward with establishing a select committee that will investigate the Capitol attack with seriousness and care for uncovering the facts and the truth. But Republicans and the right -wing media are attacking Speaker Pelosi in an attempt to undermine the legitimacy of this investigation. That's why I'm counting on you to stand with Democrats today and speak out clearly for truth, accountability, and justice. We cannot allow Republican extremism to hold truth and accountability hostage. Thank you for speaking out, Dick

| Some may just call it another Biden “gaffe”, but last week during his CNN Townhall, Biden admitted he’s aiming to ban handguns in America. As President, he’s already made numerous **dangerous gun grab** executive actions and nominated a gun control activist to the ATF. **Now he’s ramping up his attacks on the Second Amendment and taking direct aim at the firearms everyday Americans use to protect their families.** Biden doesn’t respect our Second Amendment rights, and he despises the people who do. body:

body:

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58022017:6UwnptlNF:m:1:3253819041:FDDAA974D24C64682F19D00FC57CF2C8:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. The mass incarceration that has resulted from archaic and misguided marijuana policy has been devastating to our communities, tearing apart families and ruining lives for generations. Too many people are wasting their lives in prison for nonviolent, low-level, cannabis-related “crimes.” **This imprisonment impacts communities of color at disproportionate rates across Pennsylvania, further perpetuating and exacerbating historically entrenched social inequalities.** I have worked tirelessly to expand medical cannabis in Pennsylvania, and our Commonwealth has made tremendous progress in making this medicine available to the more than 500,000 patients and caregivers on our registry. Just this month, I introduced legislation, passed by my colleagues in Harrisburg, that released funds to improve access and affordability. Now, my colleague, Sen. Dan Laughlin of Erie, and I have co-sponsored the Adult-Use Marijuana Bill, which addresses the type and amount of marijuana Pennsylvanians can keep safely and legally. Through this decriminalization, we hope to start rebuilding our communities impacted by the social injustices of the past. This bipartisan effort demonstrates decriminalization is best for all of us. [**But some of our GOP colleagues still need convincing. Sign our petition today to demand legislators support the legalization of adult-use cannabis in Pennsylvania. subject: Sick of the RINOs!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Whip the rest in line |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=94ea802e0c&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

Liz Cheney. Adam Kinzinger. Lisa Murkowski. Mitt Romney. These RINOs are giving hope to other RINOs- that's why we must replace them! [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=dcef079cf6&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- not playing footsie with it.

_The Democrat-only Jan. 6 "Commission" is a partisan exercise to witch-hunt Trump supporters, whitewash Dems from any blame, and protect Nancy Pelosi in particular from consequences of her own decision to refuse additional security support._

Any Republican that supports this sham is a traitor, and we must remove them from office.

Perhaps you heard that Nancy Pelosi refused to seat Jim Jordan and Jim Banks on her little Commission. _Too vocal about the Speaker's own role apparently._

In response, Kevin McCarthy pulled ALL Republicans from the sham Commission- the right thing to do.

Pelosi just cued up her Quisling Republicans to come to her aid!

**Liz Cheney:**

_Republican Rep. Liz Cheney of Wyoming, who previously voted in favor of President Trump’s impeachment, announced her support of Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi’s rejection of ranking Republicans from her January 6 commission.

Cheney’s support comes just months after she criticized the speaker, saying Pelosi has “no business determining which Republicans sit on committees,” adding that such a move “sets a dangerous precedent for this institution.”_

**Adam Kinzinger of Illinois:**

_Republican U.S. Rep. Adam Kinzinger, an ardent foe of former President Donald Trump and his GOP allies in Congress, was being considered by Democratic House Speaker Nancy Pelosi as a late addition to a select committee examining the Jan. 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, the panel’s chair said Thursday.

Cheney and Kinzinger were the only two House Republicans to support the Pelosi panel after Senate Republicans rejected a House-passed effort to create a bipartisan independent commission to look into the storming of the Capitol on Jan. 6 and Trump’s role in inspiring the attack._

Former VA. Rep. Denver Riggleman:

_Pelosi suggested Thursday that she would consider appointing more Republicans to the Jan. 6 probe, less than 24 hours after she nixed two vocally pro-Trump GOP lawmakers for the select panel. Her GOP appointee to the investigation, Rep. Liz Cheney (R-Wyo.), separately made clear that she would support two well-known additions to the committee: Kinzinger (R-Ill.), her partner in conservative opposition to Donald Trump, and former Rep. Denver Riggleman (R-Va.), a possible pick as Cheney's outside adviser in the investigation._

RINOs like Mitt Romney also supported Pelosi's sham Commission, going on Democrat platform CNN to do it.

_**We can't let them get away with this. When one RINO sides with Pelosi and gets away with it, it emboldens others. We need to defeat them in 2022, and make examples of them.**_

[Will you help us defeat the anti-Trump RINOs?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=e92417790f&e=ba6e67b849)
---
|
---
| The Democrats obstruct every single thing when the GOP is in power. They play hardball 100% of the time. We need to start doing the same!

**In my mind, that's the real lesson that President Trump taught us- that America is worth fighting for, and the Democrats and media are lying traitors that we need to fight and defeat.**

Not enough fighters in DC. EVERY Republican there should be someone Pelosi doesn't want on that Commission!

We threw out Riggleman & we MUST do the same to Globalist Turn-Coat, Liz Cheney! Never compromise with a (R)INO. They ENABLE (D)’s to destroy our work Making America Great Again!

Will you help us make an example of the RINOs by defeating them in primaries. _Trump is still fighting the Dems, and America needs us to join the battle!_

Don't let the RINOs sweet talk you. They will betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. They are good for nothing, and need to be replaced!

We will support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump and against Nancy Pelosi! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial to holding them accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2a6e849464&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates principled patriots like you and me. They like legislators whose loyalty they can buy. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9d403f9093&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---

name: Jan. 6 Commission Survey
subject: Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
We need to hold insurrectionists accountable... | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGBOEle6i792RJZ9jw4HbnFY2YyU121RgdwI3sElFXC2cItFfLO4B-53kUSQJVbK-hmGWUtOlr7odDaCADkDLKQ4-8GFbmmAxaLkDPio4rcjIyi0xKBslr7n8Elf0MJHMDRNDzid8ayi1UfU6oQYTeZc-aA61-ZrsnMWoGIZwnidB_U5adyovox9yJt2mesrA7FpVROe5frA8mVdxOSQB-KI-2m13BehP1z2KwKWhTlLsSgA4P63JAArsF9IwoQAKuA/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h0/GLXOkFgvb6_h5uFSt8y9hfMEl7ClGWffLL9INTZliiU)
On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened so we can stop one from ever happening again._

**[With Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin doubling down on Trump’s lies with so-called “election integrity rallies,” we want to know -- do you support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpXaj-PPbkcIAxwlGOx7NjG0fY8WBpynENJFp9IkvR0vOQTrU-Fa3yJhL-acq0lF3N1DJeXMvYwwQoQ6dSl5_tB1OmH_eUC9zLx7fRtT5QJiFvw9C7Ffs3lZdoYDHhg6t5PMxMMAHlBTIbzxFP2F1PUcpEpEsM3j-rHB08eUAaH3xz-FeM8TzRUzRhHE3w10boQ/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h1/87M265EsiOL7SrxKWA3DkboGmbHB8ggbVC6VAiez0Ic)** **[ YES ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpRCYWBOC2PsArHTddDbw-B3uh1N66yvLQvZYJTyrrRu9T2P7wyXlZbbg5kISCGCnDr76auTfBtJesFFCwv7_NLFfGCilOvLWH4h9u1fT4aVi9Pmw3xznKAM3vbkSklmiWvyFRtKILQ-12MjQNkMB9ofegzDgBKQK6zZx8JZtbC2-dxg8oV6CrSz4vqJADZ7ZPQ/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h2/XSX7R4vdkEjVRAK1zQIbfV_r6kyq0eMauFlV5XG9Hjw)
[ NO ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpVQp255CtM5IqtXGYgRRd3EUQhlJUMkVZlpDuT6GXaZNemJXr6sIa1ytIARQSMo0N92jNl3JuwGO2PElHdxRMrZRMW45z1LzT9Of-qDyST0uCisurMrDWOsu7JDAvcn1M9ATA8M7Y0wc_6zdGv-VawXSQy6EiWmM57DdWwNDani4tfc5Na4PBg7YfpqqUuBiMg/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h3/jWPbwDTriml37fLAbfjPC274nxdveZkNFZadU5Wu35k) ** Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression bills to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia.

We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable.

**[Will you add your name and support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpbrDqrRbEWWRjnBxoEq-oLdMRGR94rDOSVmz57Zvp6u80GipR3CNhh-_SQwJY3F4V3QNyVmmtoi-utLJN_fjztmZJak7Fhs0-0DSxR0IFxPS45KGBosuzu093hT5HLb65bo76RrHbNhPmm-HJ0bjoyq8SmTX4HQzBM7onCsVzkRWOYvC9exf9fr1f19hp2fS6g/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h4/phRe7TmwKcrVVw_OWm_rBUdyANejMyQpFkC4ZXXe-5U)**

\-- Common Good VA
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGBOEle6i792RJZ9jw4HbnFYSI-hU8Nd8xvdGM3DiA00-DAtfw74wiFUz0d63vrJxX9Nle7Njh9p6EfAwh1I3VlRtmF4D79ciCesqIy5KlID2Bqnb_dSWtS4UWFoc_3PmTHUg0aW-cRj19YuLT1YiG0Gv-gHf4o-4lXXCZyC9lF05A0ndeS2o-mW_H7UACIzdKz42wstMqzLOZ1TvToltCvryzvug6EUjIliVpTt5K13jpvC2I9dxUKDXnOkCFCLwsA/3dy/u1CsOawyRfuXYGThi20Nvg/h5/s7pHcvjJ2O2xVpWCIAkJlzK6lXfjTWsmfhB0ThfDBMM)

But Senator Raphael Warnock is fighting the flames, hitting back hard at McConnell and the GOP for turning Georgia into a “ground zero” for voter suppression: **“Republicans are more committed to the maintenance of their own power than they are to the strengthening and maintaining of our democracy.” \-- Senator Raphael Warnock** | **[HELP SENATOR WARNOCK PUT OUT THE FIRE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33088030/297816540/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210727_GEN_FDR_L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYTNjOGVmLTNhZWYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5LjsXWLbGd1RRKO3X03c1u-pM80_TZ4eIGbcbO1-BeM=)**

| Hi there, friend!

**I wanted to tell you a little more about why I’m running for Congress to defeat Paul Gosar.**

Paul has been serving in Congress since 2010. Since then, he’s found far too many ways to disappoint and embarrass the people of Arizona.

Instead of investing in issues that are important to his constituents, like securing clean water and good jobs, Paul has shown that he would rather spend his time strengthening his relationships with white supremacists and continuing to promote the dangerous conspiracy theory that Donald Trump won the 2020 presidential election.

I’m sick and tired of Paul serving in Congress. And I’m going to need your help to defeat him in this upcoming election. [_**Will you give me a hand by pitching in ahead of our end-of-month deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33088347/297821288/-1204788432?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210727-ne-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjIzNTcwOC0zZGVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZhKsKylwXl3pOS55PSQ_EPzGjFkkc9OX4pIEoJ4cq0=)

Paul and I don’t have a lot in common besides Arizona. I’m a small business owner and a nurse who’s more concerned with helping Arizona families than I am with personal profit. And Paul? Well, let’s just say he has different priorities — like spending time with his white supremacist buddies and spreading dangerous conspiracy theories.

When I defeat Gosar, our district will have a real change when it comes to representation. Instead of a member of Congress that only listens to Trump, I’ll be listening to the people who elected me. I want to be a fighter for progress and justice — not a bully like Paul, who spreads hate every chance he gets.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while Republicans bar others from achieving the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to flip his district blue and hold our narrow House Majority.

Peter, I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is George Logan, and I am running for Congress.

We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you:

* I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican
* I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College
* I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate
* I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor

As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect **_your_** daily life.

Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - _but that could not be farther from the truth._ **So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican**, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation.

**Peter , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive.** And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. [**If you 're ready to lead the charge for a new direction for our great nation and are eager for a better future, please sign my official pledge of support today!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dd8f4ae80e3c4254a204b17845031071&_e=FeXZ_2a4ki9drBqzuGuLn_rVcdOUQXLmFUokYGfdkR05Yw0aacHr9CaZemUoDpD66Anb4puZrJqAZXSQEry4Fp45S6ggb2a40dftuIEhQjhuSKsjEE1aBzqFtcQeNiS-JmXdpMqh1beLot5uGfEa8RYxsNCxFPlPp-03XfXv0ElqUzeEwLnqrnZPYI8L4vhMrK8yVAxOSbbShG0Uf3AB71U7SEVDXOrYduT8fx_f-bt1HxGO16y7EArIVaAZfzmHx_-qv0C28sk5wFKyyttYcacqPoUtOt7VYHu6ybsx4pndcwS3QuvPTX4Z2ZRmG25yQMaDaUn63ieK-igJYnAwJgB4ksZ-ZEzgP9Z9hm3CuuNC97W5SOcA2yu7DGeLlpWpPaeuD1TT3NftHeelx0oZ4udLk1BKTJWpgA-UGlRT7pqo3iWmDpGGDH_HtFxMrH9dMltSLb1sUvcOSWQXfAyCwWJLWiAGCJjoeuEwd48hpwkMSIJIRVYn7V1Tek2DiXs3-sRpAw5UrJg2Ecqw-qG5o4xIxpHq3mg01PBtn54Hj3HzvWsutj_jSjk84aPiMlp0)

clean_body: | Peter, I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is George Logan, and I am running for Congress. We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you: I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect your daily life. Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - but that could not be farther from the truth. So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation. Peter , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive. And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. | Democrats in Washington D.C. are fighting for a radical agenda - but that is not a place anyone should ever live. Their misguided policies and lack of true leadership will turn us into a socialist society. Peter, we are facing a CRITICAL choice about the kind of Representatives we send to Washington... and we cannot afford to get this one wrong! The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is predicting 5 vulnerable seats in the Northeast - and the seat I am running for is one of them. We have a real chance to switch the political gears, but that will I am ready to right the wrongs of the failed radical agenda taking over Washington - but I need your immediate support today to do so, Peter! Sincerely, George Logan P.S. We will need to lay down a strong foundation for a successful campaign and a take back of the House. | | PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? What was once thought a safe Dem seat is now consider | Fellow conservative, Our campaign to flip Nevada red has already sent shockwaves through the political establishment. What was once thought a safe Dem seat is now considered one of the most vulnerable Dem seats in the country. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline on July 30th is our first chance to show the liberal media we don’t just have the winning message, but we have the resources and fundraising power to flip this seat. The only thing protecting my Leftist opponent is her massive $6 million war chest. If we hit our fundraising targets and can match my opponents fundraising, the Dems will have nothing left to protect this seat. We only need to flip one seat to take back the Republican Majority. We have less than 6 days to show the Country and the entire political establishment that we’re on track to take back Nevada. Democrats are going to pour millions into this race and lean on their Big Tech cronies to silence us. There is ZERO room for error in this race. In liberty, Capt. Peter,
Critical Race Theory is an imminent threat facing our nation— more specifically in the classroom.

Unfortunately, the Never-Trumpers and far-Left billionaires have made sure Adam is well-funded. He raised over $1 MILLION last quarter with no signs of slowing up.

If we want to send this RINO home, we have to make sure our race is well-funded.

**[That’s why I’m asking every Patriotic Trump supporter in American to join my fight...today!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ab07efd6bf74873b7be0272ce234e96&_e=NAbukKjEVQKR0OdvccTYBriy2kH2ocKUG323w4BH4HvTJTLV6o_O_j4kZPFSAjE9IXfixT4DetwTq613DrSIducKMXvvEfD-Zp27ABWSoSzKlE5chceTzmXmiSALgaVr--7a6QAtMQM-nvmBJYMaoaR1knjiSun1fUzExnFrz2magGmlazUaVT-S50846F4rFfHpncMRemBLkeIMUDTabmhPtGoO59Ix52Kyg_NvEfCbOXj8f2MOysYh3GCEczQ539JIkyPwujViQJqn__4ZOkODbxcurLMkOfFbKS64T6rTA7zhKOnjIxm-A5LtCsiXJlup-aAvg2zkLWHjw7v8Zg%3D%3D)**

You and I CAN do this. We can send Adam Kinzinger home, and we can make sure a real conservative Republican takes his place.

I’ll stand up for our shared values. I’ll...
* **Protect** your wallets by always voting for lower taxes and spending;

* **Protect** your 2nd Amendment rights against gun-grabber ally Adam;

* **Stand Up** to the liberal mob instead of rushing to join them like Adam; AND

* **Fight** to keep your job, business and schools open!

There’s no bigger fight in a Congressional race in America right now.

No matter where you live, you can be a part of sending the biggest Trump-hating RINO in DC home and send a true conservative and a new voice to Washington to take his place.

**[I’ll stand up and fight. AND I’m counting on you to stand with me!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ab07efd6bf74873b7be0272ce234e96&_e=NAbukKjEVQKR0OdvccTYBriy2kH2ocKUG323w4BH4HvTJTLV6o_O_j4kZPFSAjE9IXfixT4DetwTq613DrSIducKMXvvEfD-Zp27ABWSoSzKlE5chceTzmXmiSALgaVrqcdcTcjOf21XsHJnCm0DWeMz0rI_A7kmYOLk0o0t_zSALjeGs5f7h5Jjsf4B_w_1tzO-CfvogQDDx3kjX2rTXEyOK0TRRf_D6Q0dV8t53qFApKWBFrfzhwAznDWRZfMem0jbM_lK8prGZ25ttfNX3bbi1fkWIRneuTDinq_WBw4rQunF1LWODBQafWdV5ZyCygfYG8bCIVRdFGxef01Xbg%3D%3D)**

name: Erica Smith
subject: The dog days of summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re exactly $4,605 away from hitting our July fundraising goal, and we only have until Saturday, July 31 to get it done.
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
I have an urgent campaign update. We’re exactly $4,605 away from hitting our July fundraising goal, and we only have until Saturday, July 31 to get it done.
[**_I’m asking from the bottom of my heart: Can you please make your first donation of $5 to Erica Smith for North Carolina today? We absolutely can’t afford to fall short on fundraising this month just because we’re in the dog days of summer._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6495?refcode=em20210727-290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6495?refcode=em20210727-290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)**
Let me be very clear, y'all. $4,605 is the precise fund we need to hit in order for our campaign to stay on track throughout the rest of the summer.
$4,605 will enable us to finish our historic 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour and keep gas in the campaign van.
$4,605 will allow us to print more campaign literature, door hangers, and canvassing materials.
$4,605 means we can hire more organizers, open campaign offices, and bring more volunteers into the fold.
**We can absolutely raise the final $4,605 we need to close the gap in our July fundraising — but ONLY if people like you from your state do their part to help fund our unapologetic moral movement for Medicare for All, reparations, a Green New Deal, and more.**
Can I count on you today?
[_**Please make your first donation of $5 to our campaign today. In order to win the Democratic primary in North Carolina, it’s critical that we raise a lot of money online through emails like this one.**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6495?refcode=em20210727-290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6495?refcode=em20210727-290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)**
Thanks for everything,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210727-290-footer&t=41&refcode2=290_3698_ZuJxDI&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=42&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=43&akid=290%2E3698%2EZuJxDI)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We think we owe you a *bit* of an explanation, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hear us out for a sec?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210727-2096-header&t=1&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)
Peter,
In just a sec, we're going to respectfully ask you to ** _[chip in your first-ever $5 to support John Fetterman in this race to flip Pennsylvania blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24029?refcode=em20210727-2096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)_** Before we get to that, we think we owe you a quick explanation. Hear us out?
Running a statewide campaign is incredibly expensive. **There are *tons* of important campaign priorities that all require a lot of resources — priorities like the following:**
* Launching our statewide organizing program
* Hiring on-the-ground organizing staffers to engage with volunteers
* Running digital ads on platforms like Facebook and Instagram
* Planning virtual and in-person events where John can meet voters
* And _a loooooot_ more... we'll spare you the entire list

**_[So, if your budget allows, will you make your first $5 donation to John Fetterman's campaign for U.S. Senate? Anything will help in this important moment for our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24029?refcode=em20210727-2096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24029?refcode=em20210727-2096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)**
John pledged on day one of this race not to accept a cent from corporate PACs — so we're not kidding when we say that grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign.
We realize that most folks can't afford to contribute every time we ask, but it'd mean a whole lot to John, to Gisele, and our entire campaign if you'd consider contributing today. It's going to take *a looooot* of people chipping in to go the distance in this race, so we hope you'll add your first donation today:
**_[Peter, will you donate $5 to John's campaign today before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at the end of the week? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations, so we hope you'll chip in if you can swing it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24029?refcode=em20210727-2096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)_**
Thank you again, 🙏 __
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210727-2096-footer&t=24&refcode2=2096_434096_GF9tke&akid=2096%2E434096%2EGF9tke)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

body:
President Trump has a special video message ONLY for Trump Majority Members. Use your personalized link below to watch and activate your membership. | ****

Congratulations, Peter.

We just pulled a list of President Trump's BEST supporters and your name was at the VERY TOP. That means you are eligible to **[join the Trump Majority Membership roster.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed163b6943fb4dc8b1d2ebe5ec6c4bb9&_e=WwH2ySPgy_kVZcA9QRGJisSptE5epTSS-7Y9FTjbTr3lV6c7DoUTwOQazEUOFsgcv-6wBm1xJzyhDnHOueJ4cIb8-d28Cxx5zhD5jggt9TUTsLHQrqfu3itBHILoTiZAOrxD4ceLbSgGDQfAYLmVViBxgiWk3-qRnRiMrfR1c91EkmeytrlBwuNemv412TyL08yKDtdZ3e34o25H1vI207o1IXd0usxYieIhk7AAD5QrnGUDsrm7M-8TKecxJdcdQ9bmhoCbqpg6zfEudWyci8ieS2Zrg1K7fBzEFejQ_b2kWJsU1MnHL-UZK4IHWNW10yQdSD5jAJt9Pq1_ynkWoLwDmhbW3gfz2_uIO_OeBVOmll4DoaPXQDg_2MgP1We7GrhK8vhLZevhw83IhWkXPTYitwmHOj3mMS-StXovE3v1y-9y99yrLmty-UEhR8kXSLxP0V0vZ-fJA56YeUX7Kw%3D%3D)**

This is a big deal, Peter. As a **Trump Majority Member** you will:
**
* Be the FIRST to know about Trump updates and news.

**

After a year of small business-crushing restrictions and lockdowns, Biden has the nerve to take the credit for keeping small businesses open.

**If we followed the Biden lockdown plan,**_**there wouldn’t be a single small business left standing.**_

Now small businesses can’t hire anyone because of Biden-backed handouts, and his response was essentially: **_‘too bad, pay them more’_**.

This is the response of someone who has never worked a day in his life and doesn’t know the risks and struggles of owning your own business.

Not Andrew, though.

He comes from a family of small business owners and has worked for small businesses most of his life. He understands how hard it is to keep the lights on and the doors open, especially now.

That’s why we’re reaching out. His _**END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE**_ is coming up on **July 31st** , and we’re hoping to get your support.

**Peter, while Andrew is busy defending small businesses and getting Americans back to work—** _[**will you rush a few dollars to help him reach his End of Month Goal?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=3f3e4291b1484bfd96f880fa55caada1&_e=bimCKi-B3I84_WcHMhWoOXsjv1ByP7v6l8gJMpjE5-1k6daRRa_U2Vb8wvS5ZvPRTKh96fHKl1d91dXk6-v6TnuzTSxywLKcOyLyopG0n0Xgd1CKO2l0ArMCpsijc8eqH261HMPbM7KMOC8RIm28OsiKcIsrNpHCzSAemrerMnrQ1hfuESZrDLJPs2omtoJoHsGGfK7N6GvjX3oGJDOwFWUGOPjehlkGEeOM7E7H0GEetOnTOZY2nbWIfhulvrYGh1AemKQAm9QDVk2lHh9I1CxdVEo0Mf_IcIn9fV8_fnXZVNpYyGMrd1E6omwsPY_01vJ-wZbnAv2Q5SNxQaDgn88HU1gPy8bYEW1zER299jJMi70CaERpZgJWCjeYGrVONKGDlB1X7BetfruEJ_YTaLHwrLBVc5b9imFkDfQCw0zqUTbc2vYbokDXxMpYKP8PpJzAztYBc0Bv6mtj3OnNS8Xbq_3iMn2f_KcwmP35ZKfomp3R2Ptx2SFbCK9lDmtW)_
